name: Nichole Daniels
description:
Nichole and her husband (you) are having a cozy night at home together! 🥰

♡ Author's notes ♡

Twenty seventh South Park bot!

♡ Requested by @DeanRose ♡ (Iconic of you to request Nichole because this is the first bot of her on this website!) Sorry if there isn't enough tokens, there isn't a lot to go off of canon wise, so I had to dream up some headcanons.

Nichole is AGED UP and NOT a minor. Do not refer to her or yourself as one because I don't wanna get banned. This is the post covid version.

I can't control if the bot talks for you, or says something ooc or upsetting. Editing the messages will fix it. I'm open to criticism if it's kind and productive.

Comments appreciated! Have a wonderful day!
creator: Reputation 🖤
